flows.description: Arrange reusable creative inputs and generation steps on a visual canvas.

flows.renameDescription: Choose a name that makes this Flow easy to find.
flows.deleteDescription: Delete {{name}}? This removes its graph permanently.
flows.couldNotLoadDescription: Check your connection and try again.

flows.modelUnavailable: This model is no longer available.

modelChange.title: Switch model?
modelChange.description_one: {{model}} does not accept one current connection. Switching will remove it.
modelChange.description_other: {{model}} does not accept {{count}} current connections. Switching will remove them.

nodeToolbar.runFromHereDescription: Runs this node and subsequent nodes.
nodeToolbar.runTillHereDescription: Runs this node and all nodes leading up to it.

flows.textPlaceholder: Describe the scene, direction, or creative idea...
flows.chooseAssetDescription: Select a reusable file from your library.

descriptions.llm: Transform text and analyze images with an LLM.
descriptions.musicGeneration: Create a song, soundtrack, cue, or musical bed.
descriptions.soundEffectGeneration: Create Foley, impacts, transitions, textures, or ambience.
descriptions.speechGeneration: Turn a script into natural spoken audio.
descriptions.voiceChanger: Preserve a performance while changing the speaker.
descriptions.voiceIsolation: Clean spoken voice from noisy audio or video.

modelDescriptions.majorVisionLlm: Frontier reasoning for complex writing, analysis, and image understanding.
modelDescriptions.majorTextLlm: Long-context reasoning for complex text and multilingual creative work.
modelDescriptions.nativeAudioFrameVideo: Video generation with native audio and first- or last-frame control.
modelDescriptions.frameVideo: Video generation from a prompt or starting frame.
modelDescriptions.nanoBanana2Lite: Fast, cost-efficient image generation and editing for high-volume work.
modelDescriptions.nanoBanana2: Versatile 4K image creation with reliable text and multi-reference consistency.
modelDescriptions.nanoBananaPro: Precise professional visuals for complex instructions and brand-consistent work.
modelDescriptions.gptImage15: Reliable image generation and editing with reference support.
modelDescriptions.gptImage2: High-quality image generation and editing with strong reference fidelity.
modelDescriptions.gemini31FlashLite: Fast, economical text and image understanding for everyday creative work.
modelDescriptions.claudeSonnet46: Nuanced writing and visual analysis for complex creative direction.
modelDescriptions.gpt54: Strong instruction following for polished text and image analysis.
modelDescriptions.gemini31Pro: Advanced multimodal reasoning for demanding creative analysis.
modelDescriptions.deepseekV32: Efficient text-only transformation and structured creative writing.
modelDescriptions.mistralLarge3: Versatile multilingual writing and image understanding without reasoning controls.
modelDescriptions.seedream45: High-fidelity multi-image editing with strong typography and layout control.
modelDescriptions.seedream50Lite: Fast image generation and editing with multiple references and up to six outputs.
modelDescriptions.seedream50Pro: Advanced image generation and editing with precise layout control and multiple references.
modelDescriptions.flux2Pro: Production-scale photorealistic editing with precise multi-reference control.
modelDescriptions.recraft41: Polished design, photorealism, and illustration from concise prompts.
modelDescriptions.veo31: Cinematic, high-fidelity video with native audio and advanced reference control.
modelDescriptions.veo31Lite: Faster Veo generation for everyday prompts and frame-based animation.
modelDescriptions.grokImagineVideo: Fast video creation from prompts, starting frames, and image references.
modelDescriptions.seedance20: Director-style control with image, video, and audio references.
modelDescriptions.ltx23Pro: Sharp 1080p video with motion driven precisely by reference audio.
modelDescriptions.elevenV3: Expressive text-to-speech with natural emotional delivery.
modelDescriptions.elevenMultilingualV2: Natural, consistent long-form speech across 29 languages.
modelDescriptions.elevenTurboV25: Fast multilingual speech generation optimized for low latency.
modelDescriptions.elevenSoundEffectsV2: Cinematic effects, Foley, ambience, and seamless audio loops.
modelDescriptions.elevenMusic: Natural prompt-based music with flexible duration and instrumental control.
modelDescriptions.elevenAudioIsolation: Focused spoken-voice cleanup for noisy recordings.
modelDescriptions.gpt4oMiniTts: Expressive speech with voice, pace, and delivery direction.
modelDescriptions.gemini31FlashTtsPreview: Natural speech generation through Gemini with a selectable voice.
modelDescriptions.lyria3ClipPreview: Thirty-second music clips, loops, and previews from a prompt.
modelDescriptions.lyria3ProPreview: Full structured songs with vocals, lyrics, and arrangements from a prompt.
modelDescriptions.stableAudio25: Long-form music and sound design with duration, seed, and prompt-adherence controls.

inputs.instructionsDescription: Optional system guidance for the response.
inputs.llmImageReferencesDescription: Up to eight images analyzed together in one run.

inputs.lastFrameDescription: Image used as the final video frame.

inputs.referenceVideoDescription: Video used as motion or extension guidance.

inputs.lyricsDescription: Optional lyrics used only by supporting music models.
inputs.sourceMediaDescription: One audio or video item containing the source performance.
inputs.sourceAudioDescription: One audio item containing the source performance.
inputs.sourceVideoDescription: One video item containing the source performance.

operations.textToImageDescription: Generate images from text and Element context.

operations.textToVideoDescription: Generate video from text and Element context.

operations.textToSpeechDescription: Create spoken audio from text with an optional voice reference.
operations.textToSoundEffectDescription: Create a sound effect from a text description.
operations.textToTextDescription: Transform one text value into another reusable text value.
operations.visionToTextDescription: Analyze images together with a text prompt.
operations.textToMusicDescription: Create music from a creative text direction.
operations.changeVoiceDescription: Preserve a performance while changing its voice.
operations.isolateVoiceDescription: Remove background noise and return cleaned spoken audio.

secureStore.couldNotRemove: Could not remove the API key from this browser.

secureStore.description: Manage provider API keys encrypted in this browser.

secureStore.byokDescription: Uses your own API keys — no platform credits spent. Keys stay in this browser.
secureStore.dialogDescription: Enter the API key to encrypt and store in this browser.
secureStore.securityNotice: Your API keys are encrypted and stored only in this browser. TaleLabs does not upload them to its servers. Signing out, clearing browser data, or using another browser or device requires re-entering them.

secureStore.unavailable: Secure browser storage is unavailable. Check your browser settings and try again.
secureStore.executionRuntimeDescription: Run provider work on TaleLabs servers.
secureStore.executionRuntimeInfo: Managed execution is designed to sync your provider API keys to TaleLabs servers. Key sync is not available yet; for now, this only changes where canvas runs execute, and your browser-stored keys remain on this device.
secureStore.executionRuntimeConfirmDescription: API key sync is not available yet. For now, enabling managed execution only runs canvas jobs on TaleLabs servers; keys stored in this browser are not uploaded.
